title: Implement background transcription task
description: Move audio chunking and transcriber API posting out of the request/response lifecycle into a BackgroundTask
close_reason: Implemented background tasks and polling for transcription API

title: Add CRUD endpoints for transcriptions
description: Add DELETE endpoint, GET by ID endpoint, and add Edit/Delete buttons to frontend UI

title: Fix WhisperLiveKit startup failure by removing --diarization
description: WhisperLiveKit fails to start in start.sh because --diarization requires nemo_toolkit[asr]. Removed the flag to allow the server to start properly.

title: Add 'list active' CLI command
description: Update app/cli.py to add a new command that fetches and displays active/in-progress transcriptions

title: Move test_client into transcriber
description: Copy transcribe_audio from whisperlivekit into app/transcriber.py to cleanly control websocket ping timeouts

title: Update CLI to display chunk progress tracking
description: Update app/cli.py to track chunk transcription progress from valkey during CLI transcription requests

title: Fix ModuleNotFoundError in CLI
description: Add whisperlivekit to the uv project dependencies so the app/cli.py CLI command doesn't crash when trying to import from it

title: Add transcription progress bar to CLI
description: Added a rich progress bar to the CLI that tracks transcription progress by using ffprobe to get audio duration and tailing wlk.log for the 'last_end' timestamp.

title: Add chunk progress tracking
description: Update database schema and UI to track progress of background transcription tasks (which chunk is currently processing)

title: Fix Client WebSocket timeout disconnecting
description: Add custom close_timeout=None in robust_transcribe_audio so client doesn't prematurely drop connection during transcription

title: Add back diarization and NeMo dependency
description: Add --diarization flag back to WhisperLiveKit and install the required nemo_toolkit dependency

title: Add 'just clear-active' command
description: Add a 'clear-active' recipe to the justfile that deletes all processing tasks from Valkey and Postgres

title: Add List All Transcriptions UI
description: Update index.html to display a clean list view of transcriptions instead of rendering all full text initially. Add expand/collapse or separate list all view.

title: Disable WebSocket close timeouts
description: Update transcriber.py to disable close_timeout in the websockets connect call which defaults to 10s and kills long processing connections

title: Revert to reliable paced streaming to fix BrokenPipeError
description: Change streaming speed to 5x real-time to avoid TCP/Uvicorn buffers filling up while still completing a 90 minute file in 18 minutes.

title: Fix Websocket keepalive timeout
description: Increase the ping_timeout/ping_interval to fix ConnectionClosedError 1011 (keepalive ping timeout) in the test client

title: Add speaker diarization labels to text output
description: Patch whisperlivekit API to output speaker labels and update transriber to format with [Speaker X] tags

title: Design initial schema for transcriptions, corrections, and diffs
description: Create SQLModel schema representing transcriptions, corrections, and diffs

title: Switch backend to streaming websocket
description: Move background transcriber to use websocket API to prevent 120s timeout and maintain context for proper speaker diarization

title: Fix Websocket keepalive timeout again
description: Set ping_interval to None in test_client.py to completely disable the websocket ping timeout

title: Fix sqlalchemy InvalidRequestError in CLI
description: Fix Could not refresh instance error when checking completed status in cli.py

title: Handle large payloads crashing websocket stream
description: Change websocket client to chunk large websocket payloads via max_size to prevent the connection from dying

title: Fix Bash Tool timeout killing CLI transcribe command
description: Increase the agent bash tool timeout so the CLI script isn't killed before it can finish testing the 1.5 hr audio

title: Pace WebSocket streaming
description: Change streaming speed from 0 (infinite) to 20 to prevent overflowing the Uvicorn WebSocket queue and causing BrokenPipeError

title: Fix CLI streaming websocket crash
description: Update CLI to fix BrokenPipeError / keepalive ping timeout by properly awaiting the server response and passing --pcm-input if necessary
